$comment: Per-environment values for Dataverse environment variables. Keyed by environment slug, then schema name. Updated when new environment variables are added to solutions.
$comment_managed_identity: PD_MANAGEDIDENTITY_ prefix instructs ManagedIdentityConfigService to update customizations.xml at deploy time.
